map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You ever encounter an inky-black Oochamon that looks like it's glitching? Weird little thing.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh yeah, it's all Oochin' together!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hello, yes, I would like to purchase one battle please!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This isn't even my final form!
